visual_description:
In a dimly lit, green-hued hallway, two men are seen in silhouette. The man on the right, with short dark hair, is in the foreground, looking towards the left. The man on the left is partially obscured, but a woman with dark hair is visible behind him. On the wall to the left, large, dark Chinese characters are painted in a stylized, brush-stroke font. The camera is steady, capturing the tense and shadowy atmosphere of the scene. A watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible in the upper left corner. The audio opens with a low, tense, and slightly ominous ambient sound, creating a feeling of suspense and unease.

The scene cuts to a different group of men in what appears to be a tiled room, possibly a restroom or a small shop. A man in the center, wearing a shiny, sequined vest over a patterned shirt, gestures emphatically with his hands as he speaks to an older man with white hair in a suit on the right.
